During the planning stage of a flight to Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport, France, the pilot notes the following NOTAM. If the pilots delay their flight to when SBAS is available, the earlier they land at the airport is the (1) _____ at (2) _____. 

Q) LFFF/QGWAU/I/BO/A/000/999/4901N00232E250 A) LFPG B) 1901031723C) 1901031754 E) BASIC GNSS UNAVBL FOR NPA 1901031723 TIL 1901031754 SBAS UNAVBL FOR APV 1901031731 TIL 1901031748 GBAS UNAVBL 1901031735 TIL 1901031746
